glosses.ja: ロマンチックな; 夢見がちな

sentences.target: Das Café am Fluss ist romantisch.

translations.de: Das Café am Fluss ist romantisch.
translations.en: The café by the river is romantic.
translations.es: El café junto al río es romántico.
translations.fr: Le café au bord de la rivière est romantique.
translations.it: Il caffè lungo il fiume è romantico.
translations.yue: 河邊嗰間咖啡店好浪漫。
translations.pt: O café à beira do rio é romântico.
translations.vi: Quán cà phê bên bờ sông thật lãng mạn.
translations.nl: Het café aan de rivier is romantisch.
translations.hi: नदी किनारे का कैफ़े रोमांटिक है।
translations.el: Η καφετέρια δίπλα στο ποτάμι είναι ρομαντική.
translations.id: Kafe di tepi sungai itu romantis.
translations.ro: Cafeneaua de lângă râu e romantică.
translations.fi: Joen varrella oleva kahvila on romanttinen.
translations.ja: 川沿いのカフェはロマンチックだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the head noun 'Café'.
Common noun, head of the subject noun phrase; neuter, nominative singular.
Preposition in contracted form (an + dem), governs dative; introduces a locative PP modifying 'Café'.
Noun governed by the preposition 'am'; masculine, dative singular as object of the preposition.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective in predicative position describing the subject 'Das Café am Fluss'.

sentences.target: Ich finde den Park heute romantisch.

translations.de: Ich finde den Park heute romantisch.
translations.en: I think the park is romantic today.
translations.es: Hoy el parque me parece romántico.
translations.fr: Je trouve le parc romantique aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il parco mi sembra romantico.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得今天的公园很浪漫。
translations.yue: 我覺得個公園今日好浪漫。
translations.pt: Hoje o parque me parece romântico.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi thấy công viên thật lãng mạn.
translations.nl: Ik vind het park vandaag romantisch.
translations.hi: मुझे आज पार्क रोमांटिक लगता है।
translations.pl: Dziś park wydaje mi się romantyczny.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πάρκο μου φαίνεται ρομαντικό.
translations.nb: Jeg synes parken er romantisk i dag.
translations.id: Menurutku taman hari ini terasa romantis.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att parken är romantisk i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi parcul mi se pare romantic.
translations.da: Jeg synes, parken er romantisk i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は公園がロマンチックだと思う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; takes an object and an object-related predicative.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Park'.
Common noun, direct object of 'finde'; masculine, accusative singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause/verb ('finde').
Object-related predicative adjective (Objektprädikativ) describing the object 'den Park' as evaluated by the subject.

translations.vi: Ánh sáng ở đây thật lãng mạn.
translations.hi: यहाँ की रोशनी रोमांटिक लगती है।
translations.ja: ここの照明はロマンチックだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of 'Licht'.
Common noun, head of the subject; neuter, nominative singular.
Locative adverb providing place; modifies the clause (positionally adjacent to the subject).
Main verb (copular-like), 3rd person singular present; links the subject to a predicative complement.
Predicate adjective describing the subject 'Das Licht'.

sentences.target: Unser Abend am See war romantisch.

translations.de: Unser Abend am See war romantisch.
translations.en: Our evening at the lake was romantic.
translations.es: Nuestra velada en el lago fue romántica.
translations.fr: Notre soirée au lac était romantique.
translations.it: La nostra serata al lago è stata romantica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在湖边的夜晚很浪漫。
translations.yue: 我哋喺湖邊嗰晚好浪漫。
translations.ru: Наш вечер у озера был романтичным.
translations.pt: Nossa noite no lago foi romântica.
translations.vi: Buổi tối của chúng tôi bên hồ thật lãng mạn.
translations.nl: Onze avond aan het meer was romantisch.
translations.uk: Наш вечір біля озера був романтичним.
translations.hi: झील के पास हमारी शाम रोमांटिक थी।
translations.pl: Nasz wieczór nad jeziorem był romantyczny.
translations.el: Το βράδυ μας στη λίμνη ήταν ρομαντικό.
translations.nb: Kvelden vår ved innsjøen var romantisk.
translations.id: Malam kami di danau terasa romantis.
translations.sv: Vår kväll vid sjön var romantisk.
translations.ro: Seara noastră la lac a fost romantică.
translations.cs: Náš večer u jezera byl romantický.
translations.da: Vores aften ved søen var romantisk.
translations.ja: 湖で過ごした私たちの夜はロマンチックだった。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Abend' (nominative singular masculine).
Common noun, head of the subject; masculine, nominative singular.
Preposition in contracted form (an + dem), governs dative; introduces a locative PP modifying 'Abend'.
Noun governed by 'am'; masculine, dative singular as object of the preposition.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular preterite; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the subject 'Unser Abend am See'.
